summary: Comprehensive testing of iteration 122 features: Session Mode, Accordion UI, Haptic Intensity Slider, Origin Soundscapes, Voice Command. All 8 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Session Mode with 5 guided meditation journeys working with auto-crossfade phases. Accordion-based UI for all mixer sections working correctly. Haptic intensity slider appears when haptic is active. Origin soundscape buttons visible on Cosmic Ledger for active origins. Voice command button with wake word toggle and history panel renders on authenticated pages.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 122 features verified: 1) Session Mode accordion shows 5 session cards (Morning Awakening 15min/5 phases, Deep Sleep Descent 20min/5 phases, Chakra Activation 14min/7 phases, Shamanic Journey 15min/5 phases, Ocean Calm 10min/4 phases). Starting a session shows progress bar at top with phase info, time remaining, and End button. Session auto-activates frequencies, sounds, drones, mantras, light therapy, and tempo per phase. 2) All 8 accordion sections work: Session Mode, Solfeggio Frequency (15 items), Ambient Sound (11 items), World Instruments (16 items), Mantra (18 items), Light Therapy (6 items), Haptic Vibration, Tempo & Beat (7 presets). 3) Haptic intensity slider (10-100%) appears when haptic vibration is enabled. 4) Cosmic Ledger at /cosmic-ledger shows 'Soundscape' buttons next to active origins (Pleiadian, Sirian, Arcturian, Lyran) - clicking navigates to /cosmic-mixer?origin=<origin>. 5) Voice Command button (microphone) renders in bottom-left corner on all authenticated pages with wake word toggle and history panel toggle. 6) Voice command endpoint POST /api/voice/command returns proper JSON structure with transcript, intent, params, response_text, confidence fields.
